prestazioni: Engine swap to a **LS3 6.2L V8 (GM engine code: LS3 7.0L, 19566994)** with a **Holley Dominator EFI ECU (PN: 554-111)** and **FAST LSXR 102mm intake manifold (PN: 146302)** for optimized airflow and throttle response. Pair with a **Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA turbocharger (Journal Bearing, 62mm inducer)** on a custom **Stainless Works 1-7/8" long-tube header (PN: SW-LS3-178-LT)** and **3" stainless steel exhaust with Borla Pro XS mufflers (PN: 140507)** for aggressive sound and reduced backpressure.

Suspension overhaul with **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers (PN: B16 PSS10-00-000)** specifically valved for the **GMT360 platform (2001-2005 Jimmy SLX)**, paired with **Hotchkis Sport Suspension sway bars (Front: PN 2211F, Rear: PN 2212R)** and **Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (PN: 3.1110G)** to eliminate slop in the GMT360’s weak factory subframe mounts.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a **RPM Transmissions 4L60E Stage 3 performance transmission (PN: RPM-4L60E-S3)** featuring a **Sonnax Smart Shell (PN: 4L60E-77997-01K)** and **Raybestos Stage 3 clutch pack (PN: R-3CP-01)**. Upgrade the transfer case to a **NP241C HD with a **4High Performance shift kit (PN: SK-241C)** and **Tom Wood’s Custom Driveshafts (PN: TW-1300-1350)** for 35-spline CV joints and 3" aluminum shafts to handle increased torque.
estetica: Widebody conversion using **Fiberwerx GMT360 Jimmy SLX-specific fender flares (PN: FW-GMT360-FF)** with **custom 2" extended wheel arches** to fit **Forgeline GA3R 18x10.5" wheels (PN: GA3R-18105-44-51)** wrapped in **Nitto NT05R 295/45R18 tires**. Pair with **Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (PN: 1N3.9005.10)** and **2-piece 355mm rotors (PN: 09.9464.11)** for aggressive stance and braking performance.

Custom front bumper replacement with a **Rogue Fabrication GMT360 prerunner bumper (PN: RF-GMT360-PR)** featuring **Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light pods (PN: 626111)** and a **Warn Zeon 10-S winch (PN: 103253)**. Rear bumper replaced with a **Addictive Desert Designs GMT360 rear bumper (PN: ADD-GMT360-RB)** with integrated **RotopaX 2.5-gallon fuel cells (PN: RX-2.5G)** for long-distance endurance.

Interior overhaul with **Sparco Pro ADV seats (PN: 007771NRB)** mounted on **Custom GMT360-specific seat brackets (PN: GMT360-SEAT-BRKT)** and a **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub (PN: NRG-SK-200)** paired with a **Momo Mod.78 350mm suede wheel (PN: 0111201811)**. Full **Dynamat Xtreme sound deadening (PN: 10455)** and **VaisTech VT5500 5.5" gauge pod (PN: VT5500)** for monitoring boost, AFR, and transmission temps.
